data.title: FDUSD Firestorm: Sun Presses Fraud Case with Hong Kong Officials
data.description:
The battleground shifts from social media to formal channels. Crypto figure Justin Sun now presses explosive fraud allegations against First Digital Trust, issuer of the FDUSD stablecoin, directly with Hong Kong lawmakers and regulators. His move escalates a bitter dispute that puts hundreds of millions of dollars, and the city’s financial reputation, squarely in the spotlight. Sun, a Chinese-born cryptocurrency entrepreneur, business executive and founder of TRON, detailed his actions earlier this week
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/04/04/fdusd-firestorm-sun-presses-fraud-case-with-hong-kong-officials/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=fdusd-firestorm-sun-presses-fraud-case-with-hong-kong-officials

data.title: BUZZ founder announces relinquishment of project ownership, new leader to drive project development
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jason Hedman, founder of Hive AI (BUZZ), posted on social media that he is very grateful for all the support and enthusiasm shown by the community. He will transfer the ownership of the project to @prismoonprismo (3,014 followers on X), who will lead the long-term development of the project. He is looking forward to seeing the vision and leadership of the new leader to drive the project forward.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Expiry Highlights Market Volatility
data.description: According to PANews, data from Greeks.live indicates that 26,000 Bitcoin options and 220,000 Ethereum options have recently expired, with the maximum pain points at $84,000 and $1,850, respectively. Implied volatility has risen significantly, with Bitcoin's term volatility exceeding 50% and Ethereum's remaining around 65%. Market sentiment is subdued, and the probability of a black swan event has increased, as the proportion of bearish options trading and open interest continues to grow.

data.title: Former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao partners with Kyrgyzstan to advance blockchain and crypto infrastructure
data.description:
4-4-2025 – Former Binance chief executive Changpeng Zhao has forged a strategic alliance with Kyrgyzstan’s National Investment Agency, marking a pivotal shift in the nation’s approach to blockchain technology and cryptocurrency governance. The mountainous republic, blessed with abundant hydroelectric resources, is steadily emerging as an appealing destination for cryptocurrency mining operations, with water-generated power contributing [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/former-binance-ceo-changpeng-zhao-partners-with-kyrgyzstan-to-advance-blockchain-and-crypto-infrastructure/
